items.name_en: 🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.

items.name_en: 25C Spring New Logo Tote Backpack Crossbody Calfskin with Gold Metal, giving off a fresh and fashionable vibe at a glance!
items.name_cn:
25C Spring New Logo Tote Backpack Crossbody Calfskin with Gold Metal, giving off a fresh and fashionable vibe at a glance!
With its classic design, every detail reveals
refinement and elegance. Whether it's the iconic quilted pattern or the double C logo, it's irresistible. Whether for formal occasions or casual outings, it matches perfectly. Fans, go for it!
Style AP4406
Size 14-18-3

items.name_cn:
New Arrival🆕 Chane1 25c Early Spring
Drawstring Large Shopping Bag Large Size
Purchased from counter for 56900 RMB
🔥 The explosive capacity 25c Large Tote is here~
The drawstring design is super thoughtful, flexibly adjusting the expansion space.
Contracting the bag shape instantly turns it into a large shopping bag, simply too cute~
Whether for street wear or travel, it is your best partner,
Easily handling various occasions.
Hardware: Thick plated 24k vintage gold
Leather: Exclusive zp lambskin
Size: 34*36*12 cm

items.name_en: Large 40cm (Black) OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25C Bucket Drawstring Bag! A new little cutie added to the Chanel series, deer suede. Its body is actually a small bucket bag, the leather is soft matte suede 🐂 Can fit some cute mini earphone cases 🎧, looks like a carefully curated outfit. Large Double C logo design, can be adjusted! Charming details, ⛓ chain is non-adjustable, vintage gold hardware, has a strong vintage vibe 👅 Can't help but praise this piece ✨ Style: 99921 Size: 30x 26x 14

items.name_en: Midnight Black Mimi🚩🚩🚩OHANEL Suede🤩 Classic New Style, New CF Hidden Style🙈 Was I really captivated at first glance? I just 🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and timeless 💖 What's special is that usually shoulder straps are cowhide with chains, this black leather strap is more high-end and retro, a trendy item! Size: 25cm! Small 20cm
